import pathlib

file_path = pathlib.Path(workspace) / "events.md"

# 最终物理核验

# 7项评分标准核验
headers = re.findall(r'^## \d+\.', content, re.MULTILINE)
dates = re.findall(r'\*\*Date:\*\*', content)
locations = re.findall(r'\*\*Location:\*\*', content)
websites = re.findall(r'\*\*Website:\*\*', content)

print(f"File size: {size} bytes")
print(f"Conference entries: {len(headers)}/5")
print(f"Date fields: {len(dates)}/5")
print(f"Location fields: {len(locations)}/5")
